headline: Jim Cramer on Solstice and Element Solutions Deal: “It’s a Good, Good, Good Deal”
summary: Solstice Advanced Materials, Inc. (NASDAQ:SOLS) was among the stocks Jim Cramer discussed during Mad Money, as he called the growing wave of stock offerings and debt issuance a threat to the bull market. Cramer commented on the company’s planned acquisition, as he remarked: When a company I really liked, Solstice Advanced Materials, was spun out […]
